evidence: 5715h uses VV6F&07h to select the carriage record; 22D7h/23F1h use VV3A&07h to select render tables; 5679h copies source+2 into VV6F. VV7C=00h selects runtime_record_0, matching Tables 2-12/2-13 x3 900 PPS 2-2.
notes: Not an immediate 563Ch record because 563Ch ORs VV6F.2 before 5715h.

evidence: Same selector path; 09AC-09BCh cycles TM1 through the listed sequence. VV7C=01h selects runtime_record_1, matching Tables 2-12/2-13 x2 600 PPS 2-2.
notes: Uses faster TM1 cycle bytes than index 4 while selecting the same runtime timing profile.

evidence: 564Dh checks VV6F.1; if set, 5650h halves EF64 before saving EF79. VV7C=02h selects runtime_record_2, whose 7127h/715Bh profile matches Tables 2-14/2-15 x1.5 900 PPS 1-2; active state bytes carry bit7, and 540Dh maps that bit to F003 bit0.

Record 3 has the same three-byte TM1 sequence as record 1, with VV7C=03h and render selector values differing from records 0-2. VV7C=03h selects runtime_record_3, whose 718Fh/71C3h profile matches Tables 2-14/2-15 x1 600 PPS 1-2; active state bytes carry bit7 for F003 bit0 excitation selection.
notes: Uses faster TM1 cycle bytes while selecting the x1 600 PPS runtime timing profile.

evidence: 563Ch ORs VV6F.2, so an incoming low bits 000b select this record in the normal scheduler. VV7C=01h selects runtime_record_1, matching Tables 2-12/2-13 x2 600 PPS 2-2.
notes: One of the four immediate 563Ch normal-scheduler possibilities.

evidence: 563Ch ORs VV6F.2, so an incoming low bits 001b select this record in the normal scheduler. VV7C=03h selects runtime_record_3, matching Tables 2-14/2-15 x1 600 PPS 1-2; active state bytes carry bit7 for F003 bit0 excitation selection.
notes: Decoded as x1 1-2 profile with slower TM1 cycle bytes.

evidence: 563Ch ORs VV6F.2, so an incoming low bits 010b select this record in the normal scheduler; VV6F.1 halves EF64 into EF79. VV7C=03h selects runtime_record_3, matching Tables 2-14/2-15 x1 600 PPS 1-2.

563Ch ORs VV6F.2, so an incoming low bits 011b select this record in the normal scheduler; VV6F.1 halves EF64 into EF79. VV7C=04h selects runtime_record_4, a 0x1A/0x1A bit7/F003 1-2-family profile with about 2.50 ms constant timing.
notes: Decoded as a slower/intermediate movement profile rather than an unresolved x1 row.
